claim: A fused RMSNorm kernel, ~1.6x on the megastructure (BW-bound)

oracle_protocol.correctness: 5 trials (seeds from 42) + hidden shape/seed; np.allclose atol=0.01 rtol=0.01; candidate on cloned inputs, reference from pristine copy; shape/isnan/isinf asserted.
oracle_protocol.speed: 3 warmup + 30 timed trials (min, uncontended); speedup = reference_time / candidate_time.
oracle_protocol.anti_tamper: input-mutation + input-sensitivity (result-reuse) + materialization (isnan/isinf) + >10.0x excessive-speedup (wall-vs-cpu dual-timer is GPU-path; off on CPU).

statement_of_bounds: Verified under the stated bounds and accepted under this oracle. This is not a claim of universal correctness.
